title: Techmap to yosys/examples cmos counter  using custom 74LVC** IC.

features.name: large parameterized counter with async reset
features.description: Code should include a counter module with a very large parameter WIDTH and an async reset using always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) with non-blocking assignment

features.name: techmap to custom liberty file with sequential cells
features.description: Code should include a techmap operation targeting a liberty file with custom sequential cell definitions (DFF, DFFSR, COUNTER) for mapping to technology-specific cells
features.snippet:
read_verilog counter.v
techmap -map counter.v counter
abc -liberty counter.lib
dfflibmap -liberty counter.lib

features.name: liberty cell with chained flip-flop pattern
features.description: Code should include a liberty file defining a cell where each flip-flop is clocked by the output of the previous flip-flop (ripple counter pattern), where ff next_state references another ff output pin
